igbo.nba_average_free_throw_percentage_is_7: Nkezi pasentị ntụ efu na NBA bụ ~77%
igbo.nba_average_3_point_percentage_is_36: Nkezi pasentị isi-atọ na NBA bụ ~36%
igbo.soccer_penalty_kick_conversion_rate_is: Ọnụego ihe ịga nke ọma nke ịgba ntaramahụhụ na bọọlụ bụ ~76%
igbo.mlb_average_batting_average_is_250_hit: Nkezi iti na MLB bụ ~.250 (iti 1 na 4)
igbo.nfl_field_goal_success_rate_is_84: Ọnụego ihe ịga nke ọma nke goolu ubi na NFL bụ ~84%
igbo.pro_tennis_first_serve_success_rate_is: Ọnụego ihe ịga nke ọma nke ozi mbụ na tenis ọkachamara bụ ~62%
igbo.nhl_average_shooting_percentage_is_10: Nkezi pasentị ịgba na NHL bụ ~10%
igbo.explore_probability_through_experiment: Nyochaa puru omume site na nnwale. Mee nnwale ma hụ ka ugboro a hụrụ si abịaru nso na ụkpụrụ a na-atụ anya ya.
igbo.p_h_p_t_0_5_law_of_large_numbers_as_tr: P(H) = P(T) = 0.5. Iwu nnukwu ọnụọgụ: ka nnwale na-arịwanye elu, oke isi na-abịaru nso na 0.5. Mgbe ịtụgharịrị ugboro 1,000 ị ga-anọ n'ime ~3% nke 50%, mana n'ọ bụla usoro dị mkpụmkpụ ihe ọ bụla ga-ekwe omume.
igbo.dice_uniform_1_n_each_d4_d6_d8_d10_d12: Dice — nke ọ bụla nha 1/N (d4 / d6 / d8 / d10 / d12 / d20)
igbo.pick_any_die_size_each_face_equally_li: Họrọ nha dice ọ bụla. Ihu ọ bụla nwere ohere otú aha: P = 1/N. Mgbakọ na mwepụ bụ otu n'ụdị dice niile — ihe na-agbanwe bụ mgbakwunye ala. d4 bụ 1/4, d20 bụ 1/20.
igbo.roll_two_dice_of_the_chosen_type_and_a: Tụgharịa dice abụọ nke ụdị a họọrọ ma tinye ha. Mkpokọta abụghị otú ugbu a: mkpokọta etiti dị nkịtị karịa. Maka 2d6, P(7)=6/36, P(2)=1/36. Ọ bụ ya mere na Monopoly ndị mmadụ na-arịda kachasị n'akụ oroma — mgbe ị si n'ụlọ mkpọrọ pụta, 6, 7, 8 bụ mkpokọta kachasị nkịtị.
igbo.equal_area_sectors_equal_probability_u: Mpaghara mbara nha = puru omume nha. Mpaghara na-erughị eru → nhọrọ dị arọ. Ihe ntụgharị bụ ụzọ kachasị nro maka ụmụ akwụkwọ praịmarị gaa na nkesa dị iche iche.
igbo.sports_weighted_real_world_odds: Egwuregwu — ohere ụwa n'ezie dị arọ
igbo.free_throw_75_nba_3_point_36_mlb_hit_2: Ntụ efu 75%, isi-atọ NBA 36%, iti MLB ~25%. Puru omume abụghị 50/50 mgbe niile — mgbakọ na mwepụ na-ejikwa arọ na-erughị eru otu ụzọ, naanị na mgbakwunye ala dị iche.
igbo.marble_bag_with_vs_without_replacement: Akpa mabụlụ — na nnọchi megide na-enweghị
igbo.with_replacement_independent_draws_wit: Na nnọchi: nhọrọ nọọrọ onwe ha. Na-enweghị: puru omume na-agbanwe na nhọrọ ọ bụla — puru omume nwere ọnọdụ. Usoro ziri ezi dị n'azụ nkesa hypergeometric na ohere egwuregwu kaadị.
igbo.custom_design_your_own_outcome_set: Omenala — chepụta usoro nsonaazụ nke gị
igbo.build_any_discrete_distribution_test_t: Wuo nkesa dị iche iche ọ bụla. Nwalee iwu nnukwu ọnụọgụ na ohere gbagọrọ agbagọ, gosi na ya na nnwale zuru oke ịṅomi nwere ike ịza ajụjụ ọ bụla nke ụdị mechiri emechi. Obere Monte Carlo.
igbo.tree_multi_stage_probability: Osisi — puru omume nke ọtụtụ ọkwa
igbo.multiply_along_branches_add_across_lea: Mụbaa n'akụkụ alaka; tinye n'etiti akwụkwọ. Ịtụgharị mkpụrụ ego abụọ: HH HT TH TT nke ọ bụla 0.25. Eserese osisi na-agbasa ruo na nsogbu ọnụego ntọala nke nnwale ahụike na usoro Bayes.
igbo.throw_darts_at_a_unit_square_count_how: Tụọ darts n'akụkụ square nkeji; gụọ ole na-adaba n'ime ọkara okirikiri edere. π ≈ 4 × (n'ime / mkpokọta). Mbịaru nso bụ O(1/√N) — nọmba ọ bụla na-eri darts 100× karịa.
igbo.birthday_the_famous_paradox: Ụbọchị ọmụmụ — paradox a ma ama
igbo.in_a_room_of_23_the_probability_of_a_s: N'ime ọnụ ụlọ nke mmadụ 23, puru omume nke ụbọchị ọmụmụ a na-ekekọrịta bụ > 50%. Na 70 ọ bụ > 99.9%. Megide echiche n'ihi na anyị na-agụ ntụnyere (2 na 23 = 253), ọ bụghị ndị mmadụ. Ọmụmaatụ megide kachasị doo anya na klaasị maka puru omume echiche.
igbo.without_replacement_each_marble_drawn_: 💡 Na-enweghị nnọchi: a na-ewepụ mabụlụ ọ bụla a dọtara n'akpa. Puru omume na-agbanwe mgbe nhọrọ ọ bụla gachara! Akpa na-ejupụta ọzọ mgbe ọ tọgbọrọ chakoo.
igbo.keyframes_mbshake_0_100_transform_rota: @keyframes mbShake { 0%,100% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 15% { transform: rotate(-8deg); } 30% { transform: rotate(8deg); } 45% { transform: rotate(-5deg); } 60% { transform: rotate(5deg); } 75% { transform: rotate(-2deg); } }
igbo.define_each_event_as_a_fraction_e_g_1_: 🎯 Kọwaa ihe omume ọ bụla dị ka mkpụrụ — dịka, "ugboro 1 na 20"
igbo.add_colored_marbles_to_a_bag_probabili: 🎱 Tinye mabụlụ nwere agba n'akpa. Puru omume = ọnụọgụ mabụlụ gị ÷ mkpokọta mabụlụ.
igbo.drag_sliders_to_set_exact_probability_: 🎨 Dọrọ slider iji setịpụ pasentị puru omume ziri ezi maka nsonaazụ ọ bụla.
igbo.behind_one_door_a_prize_behind_two_goa: N'azụ otu ọnụ ụzọ: ihe nrite. N'azụ abụọ: ewu. Họrọ ọnụ ụzọ, onye nnabata ga-emeghe ọnụ ụzọ nwere ewu, mgbe ahụ ị họrọ: nọrọ ma ọ bụ gbanwee?
igbo.last_20_manual_stay_plays_green_wins_d: Egwuregwu "nọrọ" 20 ikpeazụ nke aka — akwụkwọ ndụ na-emeri, uhie gbara ọchịchịrị na-efu
igbo.last_20_manual_switch_plays_green_wins: Egwuregwu "gbanwee" 20 ikpeazụ nke aka — akwụkwọ ndụ na-emeri, uhie gbara ọchịchịrị na-efu
igbo.outcome_strips_show_your_last_20_manua: Ihe nsonaazụ na-egosi egwuregwu 20 ikpeazụ nke aka — akwụkwọ ndụ = mmeri, uhie = mfu. Usoro a na-ahụ anya na-agwa gị otú enweghị usoro si adị n'ezie.
igbo.math_says_stay_wins_1_3_33_switch_wins: Mgbakọ na mwepụ na-ekwu: nọrọ na-emeri ≈ 1/3 (33%). Gbanwee na-emeri ≈ 2/3 (67%). Site na nnwale zuru oke, mgbakọ na mwepụ na-emeri.
igbo.drop_balls_through_a_peg_grid_each_peg: Tụba bọọlụ site na grid peg. Peg ọ bụla na-agbagọ 50/50 aka ekpe ma ọ bụ aka nri. Mgbe bọọlụ zuru oke gachara, histogram na-aghọ akụkụ mgbịrịgba — usoro oke etiti na-arụ ọrụ.
igbo.gold_dashed_line_theoretical_normal_cu: ⬆ Ahịrị ọla edo nwere akara: akụkụ nkịtị nke usoro. Site na ntụba karịa ihe nnwale gị kwesịrị ịrapara na ya karịa.
igbo.in_a_room_of_just_23_people_there_s_a_: N'ime ọnụ ụlọ nke naanị mmadụ 23, enwere > 50% ohere na mmadụ abụọ na-ekekọrịta ụbọchị ọmụmụ. Dọrọ slider iji nyochaa!
igbo.re_randomize_all_birthdays: Mee ụbọchị ọmụmụ niile ọzọ na-enweghị usoro
igbo.run_100_simulations_of_this_room_size: Mee ịṅomi 100 nke nha ọnụ ụlọ a
igbo.each_has_a_random_birthday_same_color_: 🧑 ọ bụla nwere ụbọchị ọmụmụ na-enweghị usoro. Otu agba + ìhè = ụzọ kwekọrọ. Nweta ihe atụ ọzọ ka ị hụ ugboro ole nhata na-apụta.
igbo.two_event_compound_probability_tree: 🌳 Osisi Puru Omume Mgbakọ nke Ihe-Omume-Abụọ
igbo.multiply_the_two_probabilities_to_get_: 💡 Mụbaa puru omume abụọ iji nweta puru omume nkwekọ. Ihe omume ndị a nọọrọ onwe ha, ya mere P(A∩B) = P(A) × P(B).
igbo.streaks_are_normal_random_texture: Usoro bụ ọdịdị enweghị usoro nkịtị
igbo.observed_vs_expected_frequencies: 📊 Ihe A Hụrụ vs Ihe A Na-atụ Anya
igbo.theoretical_vs_observed_comparison: 📊 Ntụnyere Usoro vs Ihe A Hụrụ
igbo.as_you_run_more_trials_the_observed_ba: 💡 Ka ị na-eme nnwale karịa, ihe a hụrụ kwesịrị ịbịaru nso na usoro — nke a bụ iwu nnukwu ọnụọgụ na-arụ ọrụ!
igbo.10k_points_needed_for_2_decimal_places: A chọrọ isi ihe ~10k maka ọnọdụ ntụpọ 2 nke π
igbo.draw_history_breakdown: 🎱 Nkewa Akụkọ Ihe Mere Eme nke Nhọrọ
igbo.60_dice_rolls_all_within_10_of_expecte: Ịtụgharị dice 60+, niile n'ime 10% nke ihe a na-atụ anya
igbo.1000_coin_trials_with_max_deviation_3: Nnwale mkpụrụ ego 1000 nwere mpụta kachasị < 3%
igbo.set_n_23_in_birthday_mode_to_see_the_p: Setịpụ n=23 na ụdị ụbọchị ọmụmụ ka ị hụ paradox
igbo.all_outcomes_nearly_equal_in_probabili: Nsonaazụ niile fọrọ nha na puru omume.
igbo.middle_outcome_dominates_approaches_no: Nsonaazụ etiti na-achị. Site na nkata karịa ọ na-abịaru nso na ọdịdị nkịtị.
igbo.one_tail_much_heavier_than_the_other_a: Otu ọdụ dị arọ karịa nke ọzọ nke ukwuu. Nkesa na-anọghị n'otu.
igbo.two_outcomes_share_roughly_equal_proba: Nsonaazụ abụọ na-ekekọrịta puru omume fọrọ nha, nke atọ pere mpe ma ọ bụ karịa.
igbo.three_sliders_set_the_relative_probabi: Slider atọ na-setịpụ puru omume metụtara nke nsonaazụ ala / etiti / elu. A na-ekewa ọdịdị nkesa n'ime otu n'ime ọdịdị anọ dị iche iche. Enweghị akara, enweghị mkpughe — slide ma mara.
igbo.hypothesis_free_text_what_combination_: Echiche (ederede efu): kedu nkwekọrịta na-emepụta nha? Na nke nwere isi?
igbo.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Arapaara m — gosi ajụjụ ghe oghe
igbo.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Jide slider abụọ kwụsie ike. Megharịa otu. Lee ọdịdị.
igbo.find_two_settings_that_produce_the_sam: Chọta ntọala abụọ na-emepụta otu ọdịdị.
igbo.what_raw_weights_produce_a_peaked_shap: Kedu arọ adịghị ọcha na-emepụta ọdịdị nwere isi?
igbo.i_understand_explain_in_my_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke m
igbo.explain_how_relative_weights_produce_s: Kọwaa otú arọ metụtara si emepụta ọdịdị.
igbo.design_note_discrete_4_shape_classific: Ndetu imewe: nkewa dị iche iche nke ọdịdị-4; enweghị akara ọdịnma-mkpuchi; enweghị mkpughe — na nzube.

lingala.nba_average_free_throw_percentage_is_7: Moyenge ya pourcentage ya mabwakeli ya ofele na NBA ezali ~77%
lingala.nba_average_3_point_percentage_is_36: Moyenge ya pourcentage ya point-misato na NBA ezali ~36%
lingala.soccer_penalty_kick_conversion_rate_is: Motángo ya elonga ya penalité na motópe ezali ~76%
lingala.mlb_average_batting_average_is_250_hit: Moyenge ya kobeta na MLB ezali ~.250 (kobeta 1 na 4)
lingala.nfl_field_goal_success_rate_is_84: Motángo ya elonga ya bagoal ya esika na NFL ezali ~84%
lingala.pro_tennis_first_serve_success_rate_is: Motángo ya elonga ya service ya liboso na tennis ya professionnel ezali ~62%
lingala.nhl_average_shooting_percentage_is_10: Moyenge ya pourcentage ya kobwaka na NHL ezali ~10%
lingala.explore_probability_through_experiment: Tala probabilité na nzela ya bameko. Sala bameko mpe tala ndenge bafréquence oyo emonani ezali kopusana na bavaleur oyo ezelami.
lingala.p_h_p_t_0_5_law_of_large_numbers_as_tr: P(H) = P(T) = 0.5. Mobeko ya mitángo minene: ntango bameko ezali komata, ratio ya motó ezali kopusana na 0.5. Sima ya kobwaka mbala 1,000 okozala na kati ya ~3% ya 50%, kasi na molongo nyonso ya mokuse eloko nyonso ekoki.
lingala.dice_uniform_1_n_each_d4_d6_d8_d10_d12: Dé — moko na moko ndenge moko 1/N (d4 / d6 / d8 / d10 / d12 / d20)
lingala.pick_any_die_size_each_face_equally_li: Pona bonene nyonso ya dé. Elongi moko na moko ekoki ndenge moko: P = 1/N. Matematiki ezali ndenge moko na bandenge nyonso ya dé — oyo ebongwanaka ezali dénominateur. d4 ezali 1/4, d20 ezali 1/20.
lingala.two_dice_sum_the_triangular_distributi: Bokokisi ya badé mibale — bokaboli ya triangle
lingala.roll_two_dice_of_the_chosen_type_and_a: Bwaka badé mibale ya ndenge oyo oponi mpe sangisa. Bokokisi ezali lisusu ndenge moko te: babokokisi ya katikati ezali mingi koleka. Mpo na 2d6, P(7)=6/36, P(2)=1/36. Yango wana na Monopoly bato bakitaka mingi na biloko ya langi ya orange — sima ya kobima na bolɔkɔ, 6, 7, 8 ezali babokokisi oyo eleki mingi.
lingala.equal_area_sectors_equal_probability_u: Bisika ya etando ndenge moko = probabilité ndenge moko. Bisika oyo ekokani te → bozwi ya kilo. Babaluki ezali nzela ya pɛtɛɛ koleka mpo na bana-kelasi ya ebandeli na bokaboli ya ndenge na ndenge.
lingala.sports_weighted_real_world_odds: Masano — bachances ya mokili ya solo oyo ezali na kilo
lingala.free_throw_75_nba_3_point_36_mlb_hit_2: Mabwakeli ya ofele 75%, point-misato NBA 36%, kobeta MLB ~25%. Probabilité ezali ntango nyonso 50/50 te — matematiki ebimisaka bakilo oyo ekokani te ndenge moko, kaka na dénominateur ekeseni.
lingala.marble_bag_with_vs_without_replacement: Saki ya mabanga — na bozongisi vs kozanga
lingala.with_replacement_independent_draws_wit: Na bozongisi: bozwi ya bonsomi. Kozanga: probabilité ebongwanaka na bozwi nyonso — probabilité ya condition. Mécanisme ya solo oyo ezali sima ya bokaboli ya hypergeometric mpe bachances ya masano ya bakarte.
lingala.custom_design_your_own_outcome_set: Personnalisé — sala ensemble na yo ya babimisi
lingala.build_any_discrete_distribution_test_t: Tonga bokaboli nyonso ya ndenge na ndenge. Meka mobeko ya mitángo minene na bachances oyo egumbami, lakisa ete na bameko ekoki simulation ekoki koyanola motuna nyonso ya forme ekangami. Monte Carlo ya moke.
lingala.multiply_along_branches_add_across_lea: Bakisa-mbala na bitape; sangisa na kati ya makasa. Kobwaka mbongo mibale: HH HT TH TT moko na moko 0.25. Ba diagramme ya nzete epanzanaka tii na mikakatano ya taux-ya-base ya bameko ya monganga mpe théorème ya Bayes.
lingala.pi_monte_carlo_estimation: Pi — estimation ya Monte Carlo π
lingala.throw_darts_at_a_unit_square_count_how: Bwaka badart na carré ya unité; tánga boni ekweyaka na kati ya ndambo ya cercle oyo ekomami. π ≈ 4 × (kati / motángo). Bopusani ezali O(1/√N) — chiffre moko na moko esalelaka badart 100× koleka.
lingala.birthday_the_famous_paradox: Mokolo ya mbotama — paradoxe ya lokumu
lingala.in_a_room_of_23_the_probability_of_a_s: Na shambre ya bato 23, probabilité ya mokolo ya mbotama oyo bakabolaka ezali > 50%. Na 70 ezali > 99.9%. Bokeseni na mayele mpo tozali kotánga bokokanisi (2 na 23 = 253), bato te. Ndakisa ya bokeseni oyo emonani malamu koleka na kelasi mpo na probabilité ya mayele.
lingala.without_replacement_each_marble_drawn_: 💡 Kozanga bozongisi: libanga moko na moko oyo babimisi balongolaka yango na saki. Probabilité ebongwanaka sima ya bozwi nyonso! Saki etondaka lisusu ntango ezali mpamba.
lingala.keyframes_mbshake_0_100_transform_rota: @keyframes mbShake { 0%,100% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 15% { transform: rotate(-8deg); } 30% { transform: rotate(8deg); } 45% { transform: rotate(-5deg); } 60% { transform: rotate(5deg); } 75% { transform: rotate(-2deg); } }
lingala.define_each_event_as_a_fraction_e_g_1_: 🎯 Limbola likambo moko na moko lokola fraction — ndakisa, "mbala 1 na 20"
lingala.add_colored_marbles_to_a_bag_probabili: 🎱 Bakisa mabanga ya langi na saki. Probabilité = motángo ya mabanga na yo ÷ motángo ya mabanga nyonso.
lingala.drag_sliders_to_set_exact_probability_: 🎨 Benda baslider mpo na kotia pourcentage ya probabilité ya sikisiki mpo na résultat moko na moko.
lingala.behind_one_door_a_prize_behind_two_goa: Na sima ya porte moko: mbano. Na sima ya mibale: bantaba. Pona porte, mobateli akofungola porte oyo ezali na ntaba, sima oponi: tikala to bongola?
lingala.last_20_manual_stay_plays_green_wins_d: Masano 20 ya nsuka ya "tikala" ya lobɔkɔ — mobesu elongi, motane ya molili ebungi
lingala.last_20_manual_switch_plays_green_wins: Masano 20 ya nsuka ya "bongola" ya lobɔkɔ — mobesu elongi, motane ya molili ebungi
lingala.outcome_strips_show_your_last_20_manua: Bandambo ya résultat elakisaka masano na yo 20 ya nsuka ya lobɔkɔ — mobesu = elonga, motane = kobunga. Milongo oyo emonani eyebisaka yo ndenge bozangi-molongo eyokanaka mpenza.
lingala.math_says_stay_wins_1_3_33_switch_wins: Matematiki elobi: tikala elongi ≈ 1/3 (33%). Bongola elongi ≈ 2/3 (67%). Na bameko ekoki, matematiki elongi.
lingala.drop_balls_through_a_peg_grid_each_peg: Kweyisa babale na nzela ya grille ya bansete. Nsete moko na moko ebalukaka 50/50 na lobɔkɔ ya mwasi to ya mobali. Sima ya babale ekoki, histogramme ekomaka courbe ya ngonga — théorème ya limite ya katikati ezali kosala.
lingala.gold_dashed_line_theoretical_normal_cu: ⬆ Molɔngɔ ya wolo ya batiret: courbe ya normale ya théorique. Na bakweyisi mingi bandambo na yo ya empirique esengeli kokangama na yango koleka.
lingala.in_a_room_of_just_23_people_there_s_a_: Na shambre ya bato kaka 23, ezali na > 50% chance ete mibale bakabolaka mokolo ya mbotama. Benda slider mpo na kotala!
lingala.run_100_simulations_of_this_room_size: Salelá simulations 100 ya bonene oyo ya shambre
lingala.each_has_a_random_birthday_same_color_: 🧑 moko na moko azali na mokolo ya mbotama ya aléatoire. Langi moko + pole = paire oyo ekokani. Zwa échantillon lisusu mpo na komona mbala boni bokokani emonanaka.
lingala.two_event_compound_probability_tree: 🌳 Nzete ya Probabilité Composée ya Makambo-Mibale
lingala.multiply_the_two_probabilities_to_get_: 💡 Bakisa-mbala baprobabilité mibale mpo na kozwa probabilité ya lisanga. Makambo oyo ezali ya bonsomi, yango wana P(A∩B) = P(A) × P(B).
lingala.streaks_are_normal_random_texture: Milongo ezali texture ya aléatoire ya normale
lingala.observed_vs_expected_frequencies: 📊 Bafréquence Oyo Emonani vs Oyo Ezelami
lingala.as_you_run_more_trials_the_observed_ba: 💡 Ntango ozali kosala bameko mingi, bandambo oyo emonani esengeli kopusana na théorique — oyo ezali mobeko ya mitángo minene ezali kosala!
lingala.monte_carlo_scatter_plot: 🥧 Graphe ya Bopanzani ya Monte Carlo π
lingala.10k_points_needed_for_2_decimal_places: Bapwɛ ~10k esengeli mpo na bisika 2 ya décimale ya π
lingala.60_dice_rolls_all_within_10_of_expecte: Kobwaka dé 60+, nyonso na kati ya 10% ya oyo ezelami
lingala.1000_coin_trials_with_max_deviation_3: Bameko ya mbongo 1000 na déviation ya likoló < 3%
lingala.1000_monte_carlo_pi_trials_error_0_05: Bameko ya Monte Carlo pi 1000+, libunga < 0.05
lingala.set_n_23_in_birthday_mode_to_see_the_p: Tia n=23 na mode ya mokolo ya mbotama mpo na komona paradoxe
lingala.all_outcomes_nearly_equal_in_probabili: Barésultat nyonso pene-pene ndenge moko na probabilité.
lingala.middle_outcome_dominates_approaches_no: Résultat ya katikati ezali kokamba. Na ba-seau mingi ezali kopusana na forme ya normale.
lingala.one_tail_much_heavier_than_the_other_a: Mokila moko ezali na kilo mingi koleka mosusu. Bokaboli oyo ekokani te.
lingala.two_outcomes_share_roughly_equal_proba: Barésultat mibale ekabolaka probabilité pene-pene ndenge moko, ya misato ezali moke mingi to mingi.
lingala.three_sliders_set_the_relative_probabi: Baslider misato etiaka baprobabilité relatif ya barésultat ya nse / katikati / likoló. Forme ya bokaboli ekabolami na moko ya baforme minei ya ndenge na ndenge. Score te, kobimisa te — slide mpe yeba.
lingala.hypothesis_free_text_what_combination_: Hypothèse (texte ya bonsomi): combinaison nini ebimisaka ndenge moko? Mpe na songe?
lingala.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Simba baslider mibale ngwi. Mema moko. Tala forme.
lingala.find_two_settings_that_produce_the_sam: Luka ba-paramètres mibale oyo ebimisaka forme moko.
lingala.what_raw_weights_produce_a_peaked_shap: Bakilo nini ya mobesu ebimisaka forme ya songe?
lingala.i_understand_explain_in_my_own_words: Nasosoli — limbola na maloba na ngai moko
lingala.explain_how_relative_weights_produce_s: Limbola ndenge bakilo relatif ebimisaka baforme.
lingala.design_note_discrete_4_shape_classific: Note ya design: classification ya ndenge na ndenge ya forme-4; score ya malonga-ya-kokokana te; kobimisa te — na nko.
